title: Cross-Encoder, Late-Interaction, Diversity, and Reranking · Program Brief: Rag Diversity Redundancy Selection
summary: A cross-encoder scores the whole corpus online, reranks only five dense candidates, ignores latency and diversity, and is declared better from one question. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the diversity redundancy selection increment in budgeted retrieve-and-rerank pipeline. Learners progress through predict…
objectives: Balance relevance, novelty, source diversity, conflict coverage, and duplicate suppression without hiding minority evidence.
Explain token-level late interaction, index cost, maximum similarity, query/document encoding, and when it earns complexity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-reranking-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-reranking-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_reranking_4(candidate_count: int = 40, rerank_count: int = 12, accepted_count: int = 5, cross_encoder_ms: float = 36.0, late_interaction: bool = False, evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if candidate_count <= 0 or rerank_count <= 0:
        return False, 0, "candidate-budget"
    if rerank_count > candidate_count or accepted_count > rerank_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "rerank-shape"
    if cross_encoder_ms <= 0.0:
        return False, accepted_count, "latency-evidence"
    if late_interaction and rerank_count < accepted_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "late-interaction-state"
    if not evaluated:
        return False, accepted_count, "quality-gate"
    assert 0 < accepted_count <= rerank_count
    return True, accepted_count, "reranked-context"

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Diversity Redundancy Selection model · Theory Rag Diversity Redundanc…
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Diversity Redundancy Selection: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 1489 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to budget bi-encoder candidates, cross-encoder or late-interaction reranking, quality, and latency; keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Balance relevance, novelty, source diversity, conflict coverage, and duplicate suppression without hiding minority evidence.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Diversity Redundancy Selection model · Theory Rag Diversity Redundanc….

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Balance relevance, novelty, source diversity, conflict coverage, and duplicate suppression without hiding minority evidence.
